---
title: "<i>Barnacle, The</i>"
---

## <i>Barnacle, The</i>

**Type:** periodical

### About

This was a manuscript magazine circulating among members of the Gosling Society.  The surviving issues  (incomplete series, 1863-1867)  are owned by Lady Margaret Hall, Oxford.  They are described by Julia Courtney, ‘<i>The Barnacle</i>: A manuscript magazine of the 1860s’, in <i>The Girl’s Own: Cultural Histories of the Anglo –American Girl 1830-1915</i> ed. Claudia Nelson and Lynne Vallone.  Arkansas and London, University of Georgia Press: 1994.

### Letters Mentioning This Organization


*... and 3 more*

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
